title: UnitedUnion
description: A vanilla-inspired modpack for all player types - more life, more detail, same Minecraft.
body:
# If you wanna join join the discord or add me on discord:
## https://discord.gg/5fbfSATR
## niamreg#8295

United Union is a vanilla-inspired modpack designed to be enjoyable for every type of player - whether you're picking up Minecraft for the first time or you've spent thousands of hours in the game.

The goal is simple: keep the soul of vanilla Minecraft intact while making the world feel more alive, more detailed, and more rewarding to explore.

**What's included:**

**Performance & visuals**
A full suite of optimization mods ensures the game runs smoothly even on lower-end PCs. Shader support is included, so if your machine can handle it, the world looks stunning - but it's completely optional.

**Building & furniture**
Dozens of new building blocks, furniture pieces, and decorative options let you create spaces that actually feel like home. More ways to build, without changing how building works.

**Food & animals**
New food options and animal variants make the world feel more diverse and lived-in. Small additions that fit naturally into vanilla gameplay.

**Animations**
Improved mob and player animations bring the world to life without changing how anything plays.

**Structures & exploration**
New structures are scattered throughout the world, giving you more reasons to explore. The world generation stays as close to vanilla as possible - familiar, but with more to discover.

**The End - reimagined**
The Ender Dragon fight has been reworked into a more epic and challenging experience. On top of that, opening the End Portal now requires different types of Eyes of Ender, making the endgame feel earned rather than rushed.

**Create - for the veterans**
For experienced players who want a deeper challenge, Create is included. Automation, contraptions, and engineering give you a long-term goal to work toward without overwhelming newer players who can simply ignore it.

---

United Union is built for friend groups of all skill levels. New players feel at home. Experienced players always have something to work toward. And anyone with a lower-end PC can still join in without issues.

No overwhelming progression systems. No tech trees you need a wiki to understand. Just Minecraft - with a little more of everything.
